PROP-01b-partial-pre-001.text: Bid must revert if auction is not live (auctionStart == 0 or duration elapsed).
PROP-01b-partial-pre-001.assertion: forall bid(asset): auctionStart == 0 OR elapsed > duration => revert InvalidAuction

locations.note: s_auctionStarts check at line 421; elapsed vs duration check determines liveness
